description_for_human: A server-free commons of read-only APIs served from GitHub raw.
description_for_model: Read-only data commons served entirely as static JSON over raw.githubusercontent.com (CORS-open, no auth). To use: GET the root registry at registry.json for the index of all APIs; each entry has a `registry` URL (its own index), a `status` URL, `raw_base`, and `capabilities`. Drill into any API by fetching its registry. All responses are JSON; no writes.
